name: devkit-for-strapi
description: Accurate, project-aware autocomplete, diagnostics, navigation and references for Strapi magic strings (v4 & v5) — in your editor and for your AI agent (MCP).

commands.title: DevKit for Strapi: Show Detected Projects
DevKit for Strapi: Enter License Key
DevKit for Strapi: Clear License Key

strapiDevkit.diagnostics.enable.description: Underline invalid Strapi references and obsolete v4 patterns.

strapiDevkit.completion.enable.description: Suggest real Strapi references inside magic-string call sites.

strapiDevkit.hover.enable.description: Show a hover bubble describing what a Strapi magic string resolves to (and service-method signatures).

strapiDevkit.diagnostics.unknownReferenc.description: Severity for an unknown/invalid Strapi reference (a UID, service, policy, … that doesn't exist). The 'Strapi v4 pattern in a v5 project' warning is unaffected.

strapiDevkit.referencesCodeLens.enable.description: Show a 'N references (Strapi)' CodeLens on content-types, services, controllers and their methods. These count magic-string and route-handler usages the TypeScript server can't see. Disable if you prefer the built-in TS references lens only.

strapiDevkit.referencesCodeLens.methods.description: Also show the per-method 'N references (Strapi)' CodeLens on service/controller methods. Disable to keep only the file-level lens.

strapiDevkit.exclude.description: Glob patterns of paths to exclude from Strapi project discovery (e.g. 'examples', '**/fixtures/**'). A discovered project whose path matches any pattern is ignored.
